parameters.content:
## ✍️ Pulse — Content Repurpose  (Workflow 1)

Receives **pre-built per-platform AI prompts** from the Pulse app and generates platform-adapted text for each social network using **OpenRouter**.

**Flow:** Webhook → split by platform → call OpenRouter (system + user prompt pair) → parse text + hashtags → write to Google Sheet → callback to app

**Webhook path:** `pulse-content-repurpose`  |  **Method:** POST

**Input payload:** `{ postId, contentPrompts: { twitter: { systemPrompt, userPrompt, context }, ... }, callbackUrl }`

**Output:** Each platform's `_text`, `_hashtags`, `_status`, `_generated_at` columns are written to the Sheet. The app polls the Sheet every 3 s until it sees the updated values.

## ⚙️ Setup — Do This First

**Step 1 — OpenRouter credential**
Create a **Header Auth** credential:
- Name: `Authorization`
- Value: `Bearer YOUR_OPENROUTER_API_KEY`

Open `HTTP - OpenRouter AI` node → Credential → select it.

**Step 2 — Change model (optional)**
In the `HTTP - OpenRouter AI` node body, `"model"` defaults to `openrouter/auto`.
Replace with a specific model e.g.:
- `anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet`
- `openai/gpt-4o`
- `meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct`

**Step 3 — n8n Variable: N8N_BASE_URL**
In n8n Admin → Variables, create:
- Name: `N8N_BASE_URL`
- Value: your n8n instance URL, e.g. `http://localhost:5678`

This workflow calls **Workflow 0 (Sheet Operations)** for all Google Sheets writes — no direct GSheets credential needed here.

**Step 4 — Activate**
Toggle ON after setup.

## 🔀 Split by Platform

The app sends **all platforms at once** in a single `contentPrompts` object. This Code node splits them into **one n8n item per platform** (e.g. 5 items for twitter/threads/instagram/facebook/skool).

Each item carries: `postId` · `platform` · `systemPrompt` · `userPrompt` · `context` · `callbackUrl`

Downstream nodes process each item independently — OpenRouter is called once per platform.

## 🤖 OpenRouter AI Node

Calls `https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions` with the **pre-built** system + user prompt pair from the Pulse app's platform skill files.

The app's skill files handle all prompt engineering (brand voice, platform rules, hashtag instructions, learnings). This node just executes the call.

**Timeout:** 60 s — some models are slow on cold starts.

## 📊 Parse AI Response

Extracts `choices[0].message.content` from the OpenRouter response.

Hashtag extraction: finds all `#word` matches in the generated text using regex, deduplicates them, and stores both the **full text** (including hashtags inline) and the **hashtags array** separately.

`generatedAt` is set to the current ISO timestamp.

## 📝 Write to Sheet via Workflow 0

Calls the `pulse-sheet-ops` webhook (Workflow 0) with action `UPDATE_PLATFORM_VARIANT`.

Payload: `{ postId, platform, variant: { text, hashtags, status, generatedAt } }`

Workflow 0 handles all column mapping and sheet updates in one central place. Set the `N8N_BASE_URL` n8n variable to your instance URL (e.g. `http://localhost:5678`).

## 📞 Callback to App

After **all platforms** are written to the Sheet, a single callback is sent to `callbackUrl` (the Pulse app's `/api/callback/repurpose` endpoint).

**Success:** `{ postId, status: 'done' }`

The app invalidates its cache and re-fetches the post from the Sheet to get the newly generated text. The UI stops its 3-second polling loop.

**On error:** The error handler Code node catches failures and sends `{ postId, status: 'failed', error: '...' }` so the app can show the user a retry option.
